text:
There is a broken link in www/docproj/current.sgml

Fix: To remove the broken link, I did:
How-To-Repeat: 
	A broken link In the document found at:
	<http://www.freebsd.org/docproj/current.html>
	the link for "FreeBSD VM System Overview" in
	Writing some new Papers -> The FreeBSD VM Architecture
